message:
test(harness): add final 6 conformance harnesses completing fixture coverage

Add conformance test harnesses for remaining fixtures:
- io_internal_ops: 10 tests (glibc _IO_* functions)
- loader_edges: 11 tests (dlopen/dlsym/dlclose/dladdr/dlinfo edge cases)
- membrane_mode_split: 9 tests (strict/hardened mode divergence)
- pressure_sensing: 11 tests (PressureSensor state machine)
- setjmp_nested_edges: 10 tests (nested longjmp scenarios)
- string_memory_full: 13 tests (memset/memcmp/memchr/strcmp/strcpy)

All 54 fixture files now have corresponding conformance harnesses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
